nativeTransportRule: Only @asha/runtime-bridge may import @asha/native-bridge; consumers must use the facade and fail closed on native_unavailable or operation_unimplemented.
failClosedPolicy: Consumers must stop on unknown runtime bridge compatibilityVersion, missing facade operation, or classified RuntimeBridgeError that reports native_unavailable/operation_unimplemented for a required operation. Ordinary consumers call RuntimeSession.loadProject({ source }); raw source-batch verbs are shared-adapter/test plumbing and loadProjectBundle/loadEcrpProject/manual topology are compatibility-only. Do not call raw native/WASM transports or dynamic JSON tunnels.
pinningGuidance: asha-testing should pin @asha/runtime-bridge by package path plus ASHA git commit for conformance artifacts until registry/version publishing exists; runtime evidence should record compatibilityVersion and stable operation count.
breakingChangeRequires: bridge manifest or facade signature review
downstream asha-testing conformance evidence where applicable
